title: Luffy Challenges Kaido Again
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Luffy, Kid, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Looks like you're enjoying this fight.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THE GREATER THE RISK, THE WIDER YOUR SMILE.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn, we got blown way back! Where are we?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But she's not coming after us?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That hole she made was massive,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Maybe she couldn't tell which way she sent us flying.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If she's not on this floor,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We can't let her regroup with Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've got balls if you think you can get in our way, you damn rat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Apoo had already sold us out.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: defeat was inevitable, resistance futile. I made the only choice possible.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's extraordinary that you both survived.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We can't let big mom run amok.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My odds of simultaneously suppressing both of you were very unfavorable.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've totally embraced your role as their guard dog!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your words are meaningless. Your likelihood of death...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's my role in the tragedy of Hitokiri Kamazo!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're still relying on fortunes? Unlike you, we take matters into our own hands!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 39 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
